members.label: wall feature
members.long_form_open_description: White painted baluster railing forming a loft overlook on the second floor that opens to the living area; visible across the upper portion of the image with wooden handrail and spindles, offering a two-story open-plan feel.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Directly above the kitchen opening and living area, spanning the center-top of the image

members.label: wall feature
members.description: Second-floor white spindle balcony/railing overlooking living room
members.long_form_open_description: An interior second-floor balcony with white vertical spindles and a wooden handrail that wraps the upper perimeter of the double-height living room. The railing faces into the living room and is visible across the upper center of the image.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Directly above the main living area, spanning the center third and visually separating the upper landing from the living room.
